overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game depicting a character in ancient Egyptian attire traversing a desert landscape at night. The character runs along sandy paths past red rock formations under a starry sky, approaching distant ancient ruins on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert trail with red rock butte

agents.ego_description: running steadily along the desert trail, passing red rock formations on the left

entered.detail: large layered red sandstone formation with horizontal strata
tire or wagon tracks imprinted in the sand of the trail
flat-topped rock formation visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character runs through the open desert at night, with a large layered red rock formation visible to the left. The sandy ground shows vehicle tracks, and sparse desert vegetation dots the landscape under the starry sky.

events.description: ancient temple ruins become visible on the distant horizon ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing to run forward as distant structures come into view

entered.detail: large ancient stone structure with flat roof visible on the horizon
cluster of rocks and boulders in the desert

segments.scene_description: As the character moves deeper into the desert, the red rock formation passes out of view behind, and ancient temple ruins become visible on the horizon ahead. The terrain remains sandy and open with scattered rocks.

agents.ego_description: running toward the distant ruins that are now more prominent ahead

entered.detail: rolling sand dunes visible in the distance to the left

segments.scene_description: The character continues running toward the ancient ruins, which now appear larger and more detailed in the center of the view. The surrounding desert features rolling sand dunes and scattered rocks as the destination draws nearer.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vast nocturnal desert that transitions from a rugged rock landscape toward the silhouette of ancient ruins. It begins with the character running across sandy ground marked by vehicle tracks, passing a large layered red rock formation under a starry sky. As the character moves deeper into the desert, the red rocks fade from view and the horizon opens up to reveal the first glimpse of distant temple ruins. The scene then shifts as the character continues forward, with the terrain evolving into rolling sand dunes and scattered rocks. Finally, the camera closes in on the ancient ruins, which grow larger and more detailed in the center of the frame as the destination is reached.
